overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a morning walk through the historic city of Saint Denis. The player exits a covered walkway onto cobblestone streets lined with Gothic architecture and horse-drawn carriages, eventually approaching a large stone church with autumn decorations.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered wooden porch before transitioning onto a sunlit cobblestone street. A large Gothic stone church dominates the distant view while horse-drawn carriages move along the road. The camera walks forward steadily, passing wooden buildings with balconies on the right.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit cobblestone street lined with historic buildings. A yellow tavern building stands prominently on the right while tram tracks run down the center of the road. The Gothic church remains visible in the distance to the left as pedestrians and horse-drawn carriages share the street.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns toward the Gothic church, walking along its perimeter next to a wrought iron fence. The church stone facade becomes more prominent while a large willow tree comes into view. Historic brick buildings with balconies line the opposite side of the street as the camera approaches the church entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: church courtyard with autumn pumpkin decorations

events.description: tilts camera upward to look up at the tall Gothic church tower

agents.ego_description: entering the church courtyard and looking up at the Gothic architecture

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the large wooden church doors
orange pumpkins placed on the stone pillars flanking the entrance
patterned brick pavement of the church courtyard
tall arched stained glass windows on the church facade

segments.scene_description: Entering the church courtyard with patterned brick pavement and autumn pumpkins decorating the entrance steps. The camera moves closer to the Gothic stone facade before tilting upward to admire the tall spire against the blue sky. Tree branches frame the view overhead as pedestrians walk through the peaceful courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shaded urban walkway into the open, sunlit courtyard of a grand Gothic church. It begins under a covered wooden porch before transitioning onto a cobblestone street where horse-drawn carriages pass by wooden buildings with balconies. As the camera moves forward, the scene opens up to reveal tram tracks and a prominent yellow tavern, while the distant stone church gradually shifts from a background landmark to the primary focus. The perspective then turns toward the church's perimeter, gliding past a wrought iron fence and a large willow tree before approaching the entrance. Finally, the camera enters a patterned brick courtyard decorated with autumn pumpkins, tilting upward to capture the tall spire against a clear blue sky.
